name: Menu_Comp_adj_Bien
wl_code:
nProcesar is int=0
IF sIdentifier="117" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 117, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1 THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 118, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 119, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 120, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 121, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 118, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 119, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 120, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0

gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 121, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
ELSE IF sIdentifier="118" OR sIdentifier="119" OR sIdentifier="120" OR sIdentifier="121" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, sIdentifier, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
nProcesar=1
END
IF nProcesar=1 THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 118, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado118 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 119, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado119 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 120, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado120 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 121, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado121 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 117, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF nEstado118=1 AND nEstado119=1 AND nEstado120=1 AND nEstado121=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE IF nEstado118=0 AND nEstado119=0 AND nEstado120=0 AND nEstado121=0 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
ELSE IF nEstado118=1 OR nEstado119=1 OR nEstado120=1 OR nEstado121=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1
END
END
Local procedure Menu_Comp_adj_Serv
